---
pagetitle: "ReproducibiliTea"
format: 
  html:
    css: styles.css
page-layout: full
---


```{=html}
<div>
    <h2 class="mb-0" style="border-bottom: none;">
        <span class="fw-bold">ReproducibiliTea</span>
        <span class="fw-light"> Journal Club</span>
    </h2>
</div>
<div class="container px-0 mb-2">
    <div class="row align-items-center">
        <div class="col-md-9 p-0">
            <p style="line-height: 1.6; text-align: justify;" class="m-0">
                    Founded in December 2019, the interdisciplinary journal club "ReproducibiliTea" takes place regularly 
                    to explore main questions and current topics concerning Open Science and the credibility of research findings. 
                    This concept, which originated in Great Britain, has gained widespread recognition and adoption in numerous 
                    countries under the same name.
                    <br><br>
                    <strong>What we do?</strong>
                    <ul>
                        <li>Open discussions on open science, reproducibility, and related topics</li>
                        <li>Foster exchange of diverse ideas across participants from all academic levels, fields, and institutions</li>
                        <li>In-person meetings, and everyone is encouraged to bring their own snacks and drinks</li>
                    </ul>
            </p>
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-3 text-center">
            <img src="images/reproducibilitea_logo1.jpeg" class="img-fluid" style="max-height:150px;" alt="ReproducibiliTea logo">
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- Past activity note -->
<div class="alert alert-success text-success" role="alert" style="font-style:italic; font-size:0.95rem;">
    The ReproducibiliTea Journal Club was active from December 2019 to July 2024. Any interested parties wanting support to revive it or support for a one-off event can contact the LMU Open Science Center coordinator, <a href="mailto:malika.ihle@lmu.de" class="text-success">Dr. Malika Ihle</a>
</div>


<div class="container px-0 mb-4">
    <h4 class="mb-2" style="border-bottom: none; color: var(--osc-accent);">
        Past Organizers
    </h4>
    <ul class="mt-0 osc-init-organizer-list">
                <li>
                    <a href="/people/people/laura-goetz.qmd" class="text-decoration-none text-black osc-init-people-link">Laura Goetz</a>, 2019–2024
                </li>
                <li>
                    <a href="#" class="text-decoration-none text-black osc-init-people-link">Viktoria Wiedemann</a>, 2022–2024
                </li>
                <li>
                    <a href="/people/people/gracia-pruem.qmd" class="text-decoration-none text-black osc-init-people-link">Gracia Prüm</a>, 2022–2024
                </li>
                <li>
                    <a href="#" class="text-decoration-none text-black osc-init-people-link">Finia Loeb</a>, 2022–2024
                </li>
                <li>
                    <a href="/people/people/alp-kaan-aksu.qmd" class="text-decoration-none text-black osc-init-people-link">Alp Kaan Aksu</a>, 2022–2024
                </li>
                <li>
                    <a href="/people/people/julian-lange.qmd" class="text-decoration-none text-black osc-init-people-link">Julian Lange</a>, 2023–2024
                </li>
                <li>
                    <a href="/people/people/stephan-nuding.qmd" class="text-decoration-none text-black osc-init-people-link">Stephan Nuding</a>, 2019–2022
                </li>
                <li>
                    <a href="/people/people/leonhard-schramm.qmd" class="text-decoration-none text-black osc-init-people-link">Leonhard Schramm</a>, 2019–2023
                </li>
                <li>
                    <a href="/people/people/franka-etzel.qmd" class="text-decoration-none text-black osc-init-people-link">Franka Etzel</a>, 2022–2023
                </li>
    </ul>
</div>

<div class="container px-0 mb-4">
    <h4 class="mb-2" style="border-bottom: none; color: var(--osc-accent);">
      Resources
    </h4>
    <ul class="list-unstyled mt-0 d-flex flex-column gap-3">
        <li>
            <a href="/assets/pdf/reproducibilitea_program_summer_semester_2024.pdf" rel="noopener"
               class="d-flex align-items-center gap-3 text-decoration-none" style="cursor: pointer; width:fit-content;">
                <span class="d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center rounded-3 flex-shrink-0 shadow-sm bg-success-subtle"
                      style="width:56px; height:56px;">
                    <i class="bi bi-file-earmark" style="font-size:1.6rem; color:var(--osc-accent);"></i>
                </span>
                <span>
                    <span class="d-block fw-semibold text-black">ReproducibiliTea München – Sommersemester 2024</span>
                    <span class="d-block text-muted small">Meetup materials</span>
                </span>
            </a>
        </li>
    </ul>
</div>

<div class="container px-0">
    <h4 class="mb-2" style="border-bottom: none; color: var(--osc-accent);">
        Get Involved
    </h4>
    <p style="line-height: 1.6;" class="mb-3">
            You are cordially invited to attend our upcoming meetings! Stay updated and receive notifications about these gatherings and the selected papers.
    </p>
    <div class="d-flex gap-3 align-items-center flex-wrap justify-content-center mt-3">
        <a href="mailto:reproducibilitea.munich@gmail.com" class="btn btn-primary osc-init-contact-btn">
          <i class="bi bi-envelope"></i>
            ReproducibiliTea team
        </a>
        <a href="https://lists.lrz.de/mailman/listinfo/reproducibilitea" class="btn btn-outline-primary osc-init-contact-btn" rel="noopener">
            <i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> 
            Join Mailing list
        </a>
    </div>

</div>
```
